reconciliation.horizontal: The initial full-sheet vote was unstable for the rotation-only cue; three fresh focused reviewers passed by two-to-one after whole-eye translation was disabled, and the native-size review found the complete-head pair coherent.
reconciliation.vertical: The initial full-sheet vote was unstable, but all three focused reviewers passed and the complete head control has the required negative rendered screen-Y delta.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: whole-eye controls disabled before final direction rendering; head coefficients unchanged
